title: bigelowia sinuata
intro: Bigelowia sinuata is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues, due to its bitter and astringent compounds. Herbal preparations of Bigelowia sinuata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
